principle: Observe freely. Recommend with evidence. Change the athlete's world only with approval.

boundaries.reason: Reading authorized athlete data is reversible and does not alter the training plan.
Analysis may run immediately, but uncertain portions and ingredients must be confirmed before logging.
Image-based nutrition values are estimates and become athlete data only after confirmation.
Training changes must be presented as a proposal with evidence, never silently applied.
Writing to the athlete's Garmin calendar is an external side effect.
The harness provides wellness coaching, not diagnosis or treatment. Urgent symptoms require qualified care.
